feedback.text: Preventing publishers and game developers from permanently removing an option to play video games or removing video games altogether from distribution platforms and even accounts of players after purchase, without a warning or compensation, should be unquestionably covered by digital fairness act. 1.4 million EU citizens already signed the "Stop Destroying Videogames" petition, which shows how important this issue is. It's not only about video games, but about our rights as consumers as a whole.
